name: Hot Pepper & Garlic Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 3 each Chili peppers, fresh or dried, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Process the chili peppers, 6 of the garlic cloves, and the water in a food processor or blender until it makes a pungent, soup-like mixture.
2. Carefully open the top when blending, as the fumes will be strong.
3. Bring a large pan of salted water to a boil.
4. Pour the chili & garlic mixture through a sieve into the boiling water. Save or discard the solids as desired.
5. Add the pasta to the seasoned boiling water and cook until al dente.
6. Drain the pasta.
7. Toss the hot, drained pasta with olive oil and parsley.
8. Season with salt and serve.
